description_fr: Films cultes des années 50-90, légendes hollywoodiennes, scènes mythiques.
description_en: Cult films from the 50s-90s, Hollywood legends, iconic scenes.

questions.question_fr: Quel film de 1939 commence par 'Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn' ?
questions.question_en: Which 1939 film features 'Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn'?
questions.explanation_fr: Clark Gable prononce cette réplique dans Autant en emporte le vent (1939).
questions.explanation_en: Clark Gable says this line in Gone with the Wind (1939).

questions.explanation_fr: Hitchcock, le 'maître du suspense', réalise Psycho avec la célèbre scène de la douche.
questions.explanation_en: Hitchcock, 'master of suspense', directed Psycho with the famous shower scene.

questions.question_fr: Marlon Brando a refusé l'Oscar du Meilleur Acteur pour Le Parrain en 1973.
questions.question_en: Marlon Brando refused the Best Actor Oscar for The Godfather in 1973.
questions.explanation_fr: Brando a refusé en signe de protestation contre le traitement des Amérindiens à Hollywood.
questions.explanation_en: Brando refused in protest against Hollywood's treatment of Native Americans.

questions.question_fr: Quelle actrice est l'icône de Casablanca (1942) ?
questions.question_en: Which actress is the icon of Casablanca (1942)?
questions.explanation_fr: Ingrid Bergman incarne Ilsa face à Humphrey Bogart (Rick).
questions.explanation_en: Ingrid Bergman plays Ilsa opposite Humphrey Bogart (Rick).

questions.question_fr: Quel film de Stanley Kubrick suit un astronaute et l'IA HAL 9000 ?
questions.question_en: Which Kubrick film follows an astronaut and the AI HAL 9000?
questions.explanation_fr: 2001: l'Odyssée de l'espace (1968) est révolutionnaire visuellement et conceptuellement.
questions.explanation_en: 2001: A Space Odyssey (1968) is visually and conceptually revolutionary.

questions.question_fr: Le réalisateur du film Jaws (1975) s'appelle Steven ___.
questions.question_en: The director of Jaws (1975) is Steven ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Spielberg a 27 ans en 1975 quand Jaws devient le premier blockbuster moderne.
questions.explanation_en: Spielberg was 27 in 1975 when Jaws became the first modern blockbuster.

questions.question_fr: Quelle actrice joue Holly Golightly dans Diamants sur canapé ?
questions.question_en: Which actress plays Holly Golightly in Breakfast at Tiffany's?
questions.explanation_fr: Audrey Hepburn (1961) avec sa célèbre robe noire Givenchy.
questions.explanation_en: Audrey Hepburn (1961) with her famous black Givenchy dress.

questions.question_fr: E.T. (1982) a longtemps détenu le record du film le plus rentable.
questions.question_en: E.T. (1982) long held the highest-grossing film record.
questions.explanation_fr: E.T. a détenu le record de 1982 à 1993 (battu par Jurassic Park).
questions.explanation_en: E.T. held the record from 1982 to 1993 (beaten by Jurassic Park).

questions.question_fr: Qui joue Jack Dawson dans Titanic (1997) ?
questions.question_en: Who plays Jack Dawson in Titanic (1997)?
questions.explanation_fr: Leonardo DiCaprio face à Kate Winslet (Rose). Réalisé par James Cameron.
questions.explanation_en: Leonardo DiCaprio opposite Kate Winslet (Rose). Directed by James Cameron.

questions.question_fr: Quel film a popularisé la phrase 'Hasta la vista, baby' ?
questions.question_en: Which film popularized the line 'Hasta la vista, baby'?

questions.question_fr: Le célèbre 'I'll be back' est de ___.
questions.question_en: The famous 'I'll be back' is from ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Terminator (1984) avec Schwarzenegger réalisé par James Cameron.
questions.explanation_en: The Terminator (1984) with Schwarzenegger, directed by James Cameron.

questions.question_fr: Le film Forrest Gump est sorti en 1994.
questions.explanation_fr: Forrest Gump (Robert Zemeckis) a remporté 6 Oscars dont meilleur film en 1995.
questions.explanation_en: Forrest Gump (Robert Zemeckis) won 6 Oscars including Best Picture in 1995.

questions.explanation_fr: Quentin Tarantino, Palme d'Or à Cannes 1994.
questions.explanation_en: Quentin Tarantino, Palme d'Or at Cannes 1994.

questions.question_fr: Quel acteur a joué Indiana Jones ?
questions.explanation_fr: Harrison Ford joue Indy depuis 1981. Sean Connery joue son père dans le 3e film.
questions.explanation_en: Harrison Ford has played Indy since 1981. Sean Connery plays his father in the 3rd film.

questions.question_fr: Dans le Magicien d'Oz, Dorothy a un chien nommé ___.
questions.question_en: In The Wizard of Oz, Dorothy has a dog named ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Toto est le terrier qui accompagne Dorothy. 'There's no place like home'.
questions.explanation_en: Toto is the terrier accompanying Dorothy. 'There's no place like home'.
